<?php /** * This file is part of the ramsey/uuid library * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. * * @copyright Copyright (c) Ben Ramsey <ben@benramsey.com> * @license http://opensource.org/licenses/MIT MIT */ declare(strict_types=1); namespace Ramsey\Uuid\Exception; /** * Thrown to indicate that the string received is not a valid UUID * * The InvalidArgumentException that this extends is the ramsey/uuid version of this exception. It exists in the same * namespace as this class. */ class InvalidUuidStringException extends InvalidArgumentException implements UuidExceptionInterface { }
